world.title: Number Friends
world.tagline: Numbers are blocks you can pull apart and snap together.

stage-0.title: Meet the Blocks
stage-0.goal: See each number as a tower of blocks — and know it by its shape.
missions: Stand on 1 leg and count to 5!
Spot 1 red thing in your home.

stage-1.title: Pull Apart
stage-1.goal: Split a tower into two parts.
missions: Split 4 grapes into 2 bowls!
Break a cracker in half — how much is each half?

stage-2.title: Snap Together
missions: Hold 1 pebble in your left hand, 2 in your right — join them, how many?
Line up 2 pairs of shoes — count how many shoes in all!

stage-3.title: The Whole of Me
stage-3.goal: Find every way to split a number.
missions: Stack 5 toys in a pile — how many ways can you split the pile into 2 groups?
Snap 6 craft sticks into 3 and 3!
Find 2 ways to share 4 candies between 2 friends.

stage-4.title: Hide and Seek
missions: Hide 2 of 5 toys behind your back — guess how many are hiding!
Play hide and seek as a family — count out loud to 10!

stage-5.title: Friends of 5 and 10
missions: Hold up 3 fingers — how many more to make 5?
Count to 10 on your fingers, nice and loud!
Line up 10 beads in 2 rows of 5 like a ten-frame.

stage-6.title: Ten and Some Ones
stage-6.goal: Teen numbers are ten and some ones.
missions: Count 12 stair steps — stop at step 10 and shout TEN!
Line up 13 pebbles: 10 in a row — how many are left over?

stage-7.title: Doubles & Halves
stage-7.goal: Two equal groups: add them up, or share into two.
missions: Count your socks by 2s — how many pairs?
Share 8 grapes fairly with a friend — how many each?

stage-8.title: Triples & Thirds
stage-8.goal: Three equal groups: add them up, or share into three.
missions: Count the wheels on 3 tricycles by 3s!
Share 9 crayons into 3 equal cups — how many in each?

meet-blocks-intro.title: Meet the Blocks
meet-blocks-intro.instruction: Tap to meet each number friend!
steps: Hi! Every number is made of blocks.
One block is One.
Add a block — now it's Two!
Five looks like the dots on dice.
Ten is two rows of five.
Tap a friend to hear its name!

tower-to-numeral.title: Which Number?
tower-to-numeral.instruction: Pick the number that matches the blocks.

who-is-bigger.title: Who Is Bigger?
who-is-bigger.instruction: Tap the taller tower — or = if they match!

stamp-shapes.title: Bouncy Stamps
stamp-shapes.instruction: Look at the stamps — whose are they?
stamp-shapes.correct: Right! It's still {{n}}, any way it stands.

split-intro.title: Breaking Apart!
split-intro.instruction: Tap to watch the blocks split!
steps: Hi! I'm Four. I have a fun trick!
Watch — I split into 2 and 2!
I can also split into 3 and 1!
Your turn — tap the seam to split Six!
Next stage: Let's put them back together!

split-free.title: Break It Free
split-free.instruction: Tap a bright seam to split the tower!

split-name.title: Which and Which?
split-name.instruction: What did the tower just split into?

missing-part.title: The Missing Part
missing-part.instruction: How much is missing to match the big tower?

merge-intro.title: Joining Up!
merge-intro.instruction: Watch the two friends, then tap the step they reach together!
steps: Hi! I'm Two. Watch this magic staircase!
Two stands on step 2, Three stands on step 3.
Hold hands — together they reach step 5!
One and Three join up — which step do they reach?
Next stage: The Whole of Me!
merge-intro.demo1q: Two and Three join up — which step do they reach?
merge-intro.demo2q: One and Three join up — which step?
merge-intro.play: {{a}} and {{b}} join up — which step do they reach?
merge-intro.higher: Higher! They reach a bigger step.
merge-intro.lower: Lower! They reach a smaller step.

merge-free.title: Join Two Friends
merge-free.instruction: Drag one friend onto the other (or tap them one at a time)!

merge-name.title: How Many Together?
merge-name.instruction: How many do these two friends make together?

pick-pair.title: Who Makes Me?
pick-pair.instruction: Which pair joins together to make this number?
pick-pair.incorrect: That pair isn't {{n}} — look at the highlighted pair.

bonds-intro.title: All About Me
bonds-intro.instruction: Tap to see every way Six can split!
steps: Hi! I'm Six — I'm hiding lots of friend-pairs inside!
One and Five!
Two and Four!
Three and Three — twins!
Any way you split me, I'm still Six!
Next stage: Hide and Seek!

fruit-salad.title: The Fruit Splitter
fruit-salad.instruction: Fruit splitter machine — how many fruits are left in the bowl?

all-bonds.title: How Many Ways?
all-bonds.instruction: Find ALL the pairs that make this number friend!
all-bonds.foundAll: You found every way to split {{n}}!

inside-me.title: Who's Inside Me?
inside-me.instruction: Tap EVERY friend who fits inside the big number!
inside-me.tooBig: That friend is too big to fit inside!
inside-me.foundAll: You found them all — every small friend fits inside {{n}}!
inside-me.nobodyMsg: Right! One is too tiny to hold anybody.

fill-shape.title: Fill the Shape
fill-shape.instruction: Which block friend fills the empty space exactly?

doubles.title: Mirror Doubles
doubles.instruction: Look in the mirror — two identical friends make how many together?
doubles.halveInstruction: Break it evenly in half — how many in each half?
doubles.halveCorrect: Yes! {{n}} split in half makes {{a}} and {{a}}.

hide-intro.title: Hide and Seek
hide-intro.instruction: Watch, then guess how many friends are hiding behind the bush!
steps: Hi! I'm Three — hide-and-seek champion!
Shh… two friends are hiding behind the bush!
Out they come — still Five!
Now three friends of Seven go hide…
See — 4 and 3 make 7!
Next stage: Friends of 5 and 10!
hide-intro.demo1q: Five friends! Shh… some duck behind the bush.
hide-intro.demo1a: 2 are hiding. We see 3 — but it's still 5!
hide-intro.demo2q: Some are hiding again — how many this time?
hide-intro.play: Some friends are hiding! How many are behind the bush?
hide-intro.correct: Caught you! {{k}} were hiding — {{m}} and {{k}} make {{n}}.

hide-seek.title: Hiding Blocks
hide-seek.instruction: How many friends are hiding behind the bush?
hide-seek.correct: Caught you! {{k}} were hiding — {{m}} and {{k}} make {{n}}.

bond-missing.title: Mystery Piece
bond-missing.instruction: What number goes in the empty circle?

take-away.title: How Many Left?
take-away.instruction: Some blocks fly away — how many are left?

frame-intro.title: Hands of Five & Frames of Ten
frame-intro.instruction: Tap to get to know the five-frame and the ten-frame!
steps: I'm Five — like an open hand!
The frame has 3 already… 2 more to fill it up!
Full five — high five!
And I'm Ten — two rows of five, two hands!
Next stage: Ten and Some Ones!

five-frame.title: Fill the Five Frame
five-frame.instruction: Tap the empty boxes to fill the five-frame!

ten-frame.title: Fill the Ten Frame
ten-frame.instruction: Tap the empty boxes to fill the ten-frame!

number-rainbow.title: Rainbow of Ten
number-rainbow.instruction: Which number friend pairs with the bright one to make 10?
number-rainbow.ask: How many friends does {{a}} need to make 10?

how-many-more.title: How Many More?
how-many-more.instruction: How many more boxes to fill the ten-frame?

teen-intro.title: Ten and Some Ones
teen-intro.instruction: Tap to meet the teen numbers!
steps: I'm Ten — two neat rows of five!
Here's Ten… and three loose friends.
Join them up — Ten-and-three: Thirteen!
Split Fifteen apart — there's always a Ten friend inside!
You've gone through the whole journey — replay any stage you like!

teen-build.title: Build a Teen
teen-build.instruction: Tap the empty spots to build the number!

teen-split.title: Split a Teen
teen-split.instruction: This number is 10 and how many more?

teen-merge.title: Make a Teen
teen-merge.instruction: Ten and some ones join up — what teen number do they make?

teen-name.title: Name the Teen
teen-name.instruction: A full ten and some ones — which number is it?

teen-match.title: Match the Teen
teen-match.instruction: Tap a number, then tap its blocks to match!

doubles-add.title: Add Two Groups
doubles-add.instruction: Two equal groups — add them up!

doubles-flash.title: Flash Doubles
doubles-flash.instruction: Peek at two equal groups, then say how many!
doubles-flash.peek: Quick — how many in {{k}} equal groups?

doubles-ladder.title: Count by 2
doubles-ladder.instruction: Tap the numbers, counting by two!
doubles-ladder.done: You counted by {{k}} all the way!

doubles-match.title: Match the Double
doubles-match.instruction: Match each group with its double!

doubles-share.title: Share into 2 Rows
doubles-share.instruction: Share the blocks into two equal rows — how many in each?
doubles-share.play: {{total}} shared into {{k}} equal rows — how many in each row?

triples-add.title: Add Three Groups
triples-add.instruction: Three equal groups — add them up!

triples-flash.title: Flash Triples
triples-flash.instruction: Peek at three equal groups, then say how many!
triples-flash.peek: Quick — how many in {{k}} equal groups?

triples-ladder.title: Count by 3
triples-ladder.instruction: Tap the numbers, counting by three!
triples-ladder.done: You counted by {{k}} all the way!

triples-match.title: Match the Triple
triples-match.instruction: Match each group with its triple!

triples-share.title: Share into 3 Rows
triples-share.instruction: Share the blocks into three equal rows — how many in each?
triples-share.play: {{total}} shared into {{k}} equal rows — how many in each row?
